one_liner: AI-powered meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes video meetings with searchable transcripts and team collaboration features.

auth_methods.notes: Generated via user settings, passed using X-Api-Key header or apiKeyAuth security scheme in SDKs
Bearer token authentication via Authorization header or bearerAuth security configuration
OAuth 2.0 for public integrations requiring registered app client ID and secret

self_serve_notes: Fathom AI (fathom.video) appears to offer a free-forever plan. Note: The evidence mentions confusion between Fathom Analytics (website analytics, paid) and Fathom AI (meeting assistant, free plan available). API access is self-serve once authenticated.

api_surface.notes: REST API with TypeScript and Python SDKs. Endpoints include list_meetings, get_transcript, get_summary, list_teams, list_team_members. Clear documentation for developers.

evidence.supports: API key and Bearer token authentication methods documented with SDK examples
OAuth 2.0 authentication for multi-user integrations requiring app registration
REST API with available methods and quickstart documentation
Official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for connecting meeting data to AI assistants
